error_signature: hover dropdown not recognizing mouse actions
title: Hover dropdown not working outside of Datagrid
symptom: The hover dropdown fails to recognize mouse actions when it expands outside the parent datagrid. Attempts to adjust Z-Order and Overflow settings have not resolved the issue.
applies_when: Dropdown expands outside of the parent datagrid
not_this_if: Dropdown is fully contained within the datagrid
root_cause: The issue arises because the dropdown's mouse actions are not recognized when it overflows the boundaries of the parent datagrid. This can occur if the datagrid's Z-Axis is not properly set, preventing the dropdown from being interactive.
fix_steps: Set the Z-Axis property on the datagrid
Ensure the overflow property is set to visible
Test the hover dropdown functionality again
agent_instruction: Adjust the Z-Axis and overflow settings on the datagrid to ensure the hover dropdown works correctly.
